creator: sdalu@sdalu.com
text:
I'm using ruby 2 (not tested with other versions)


===>   Registering installation for rrdtool-1.4.8 as automatic
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/databases/rrdtool/work/stage/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.0/amd64-freebsd9/RRD.so): No such file or directory
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 74

Fix: 

Disable ruby support (make config)
How-To-Repeat: portupgrade -f rrdtool
